content: The intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) that drive autonomous agent exploration can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for state-of-the-art active learning agent memory, where only memory traces that trigger non-trivial prediction error (the core signal of ICM) are retained and flagged for future active learning refinement. This creates a self-sustaining memory loop that grows only high-value, uncertainty-reducing knowledge without manual curation.
